name: Programme Bulk Service Request — 3 Parallel Requests
process: PA Email — Multi-Request Bulk Programme Management
pathway: Email + Voice Note → 3 Parallel Requests → HITL (R1) → Resolve → Needs Review

name: Three Requests in One Email
pathway: Decline Investigation → Travel Activation → Limit Increase → Spend Data

name: Routine Limit Increase Uncovers an Unactioned Fraud Alert
process: PA Email — Limit Increase Request (Possible Fraud)
pathway: Limit Request → Fraud Alert Detected → HITL → Hold & Escalate

name: Cardholder Name Change — Three-Document Identity Chain
process: PA Email — Cardholder Name Change (Identity Chain)
pathway: Email Received → Marriage Cert Extracted → MiVision Cross-Ref → Discrepancy → Doc Request → Passport Received → Identity Chain Validated → Name Changed → Replacement Card

name: Hotel Cancellation — Full Amount Recovered via Mastercard 4853
pathway: Dispute Intake → Reason Code Assessment → Evidence Assembly → MDR Filing → Merchant Accepts
